name: Electronic Arts
current_projects: EA is currently working on EA Sports FC series (successor to FIFA), the next Battlefield game, and expanding Apex Legends content.
description: Electronic Arts (EA) is one of the largest video game publishers in the world, known for its sports games, shooters, and simulation titles.

name: Rockstar Games
headquarters: New York City, New York, USA
current_projects: Rockstar Games is currently working on Grand Theft Auto VI (GTA 6), which was officially revealed with a trailer in December 2023. After multiple delays, GTA 6 is scheduled to release on November 19, 2026 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S. The game is set in the fictional state of Leonida (based on Florida) and follows protagonists Jason and Lucia.
description: Rockstar Games is a renowned video game publisher known for creating expansive open-world games with mature narratives and high production values.

name: Nintendo
current_projects: Nintendo is working on games for the Nintendo Switch 2 console, including new entries in their flagship franchises.
description: Nintendo is a Japanese multinational video game company and one of the most recognized names in gaming, known for family-friendly yet deeply engaging games.

name: Sony Interactive Entertainment
current_projects: Sony is expanding its live-service games lineup and continuing to develop PlayStation exclusive titles including new entries in their flagship series.
description: Sony Interactive Entertainment (SIE) is the video game division of Sony, responsible for the PlayStation brand and some of gaming's most acclaimed exclusive titles.

name: CD Projekt
current_projects: CD Projekt Red is currently developing Project Polaris (the next Witcher game), Project Orion (Cyberpunk sequel), and Project Hadar (a new IP).
description: CD Projekt is a Polish video game developer and publisher best known for The Witcher series and Cyberpunk 2077, and also operates the GOG.com digital distribution platform.

name: FromSoftware
current_projects: FromSoftware released the Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree DLC in 2024 and is reportedly working on new projects.
description: FromSoftware is a Japanese game developer renowned for creating challenging action RPGs with intricate world design and deep lore.

name: Mojang Studios
current_projects: Mojang continues to update Minecraft with regular content updates and is expanding the Minecraft universe with new spinoff titles.
description: Mojang Studios is a Swedish game developer best known for creating Minecraft, one of the best-selling video games of all time.

name: Bandai Namco Entertainment
current_projects: Bandai Namco is working on new entries in their fighting game franchises and continuing to publish collaborative titles with FromSoftware.
description: Bandai Namco Entertainment is a Japanese multinational video game publisher known for a diverse portfolio spanning fighting games, RPGs, and arcade titles.

name: Annapurna Interactive
current_projects: Annapurna Interactive continues to publish highly curated indie titles and is developing an animated film adaptation of Stray.
description: Annapurna Interactive is the video game publishing division of Annapurna Pictures, focused on publishing personal and innovative indie games with strong artistic vision.

name: Raw Fury
current_projects: Raw Fury continues to publish narrative-driven and artistically unique indie titles across multiple platforms.
description: Raw Fury is a Swedish indie game publisher known for supporting creative and artistic indie games, providing developers with funding and publishing support while maintaining creative freedom.
